subcodes.first_line: O spiritual beloved! Thy musk-scented letter was perused. They seek to extinguish the fire of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب روحانی نامه مشکین ملاحظه گردید یریدون ان یخمدوا نار محبت الله
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
